title: DMR: Phantom Dragon
description: A dragon variant based on the phantom for Dragon Mounts Remastered
body:
![Image of the phantom dragon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e2118ff1142168650d2ce71d54775f44725fa4f3.png)
# **Dragon Mounts Remastered: Phantom Dragon**


This is a data pack that's also packaged as a mod which adds a custom dragon variant based on the phantom to [Dragon Mounts: Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/dmr) for 1.21.1 NeoForge. General gameplay, taming and breeding is practically the same as the base DMR mod.




**Obtaining**

Unlike most other dragon mounts types the phantom dragon is not obtained by looting structures, but instead the egg must be crafted using any dragon egg and phantom membranes.
![Crafting recipe for the phantom dragon egg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/faefc09dec4b6dc31b4c647c8179b698c52780df.png)
